description:
Offered: every semester
Students assist in faculty-led basic and/or applied research in Psychological Science. Students are expected to complete or conduct a scientific literature review as part of this experience. This experience is offered primarily to Psychological Science majors or minors, or Neuroscience, Behavior and Cognition minors, of junior or senior standing, and it requires approval of the professor.
Prerequisite(s): A 2.5 cumulative average
